nasb.text: Therefore he called that place Beersheba, because there the two of them took an oath.

esv.text: Therefore that place was called Beersheba, because there both of them swore an oath.

cnv.text: 因此那地方名叫別是巴，因為他們二人在那裡起了誓。

ccb.text: 所以，那地方被称为别示巴，因为他们二人在那里起了誓。

csbs.text: 因此那地方被称为比尔-谢巴，因为他们两人在那里起了誓。
